creator: royger@freebsd.org
text:
(In reply to Bhavesh Davda from comment #16)
Sadly dhclient is not my area of expertise, so we will have to wait for someone to review it. I've created a differential revision based on your patch, and assigned it to the networking people. Hopefully we will get an answer soon:

https://reviews.freebsd.org/D9832

Feel free to register, and I can assign the patch to you (and then you will be able to provide further changes if required).

Thanks!
